rawIntent: [gestalt-maintenance/CONTEXT_ALIGNMENT] Reconcile docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: entity 'description' exists in the domain model but no module references it. Decide whether to introduce the module under src/modules/description/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.

successCriteria.description: The 'description' entity is either removed from the domain model or a corresponding module is introduced under src/modules/description/.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Changes to other domains or modules not related to 'description'
Modifications to the API, UI, infra, test, or config layers

ambiguities.description: Should the 'description' entity be removed or should a new module be introduced?
options: Remove the entity from the domain model
Introduce a new module under src/modules/description/
